recommendations.title: ...It's Snowing Outside!
recommendations.overview: After their mother dies, three brothers must live together in order to get their inheritance — and soon start to uncover dark family secrets.

recommendations.title: Una festa esagerata
recommendations.overview: Mirea is about to be 18 years old, and her family is prepearing a big party for her. Teresa, Mirea's mother, wants to gain notoriety, so begins to spend recklessy for the celebration. When the day finally comes, an unexpected death puts it at risk.

recommendations.title: Three Perfect Daughters
recommendations.overview: Three families go into crisis when their daughters get engaged because they are convinced that their young daughters have all chosen a wrong partner.

recommendations.title: 10 Rules for Falling in Love
recommendations.overview: Womanizer father teaches clumsy son the decalogue of seduction: ten foolproof rules to make any woman fall in love. But the results will be not what expected.

recommendations.title: Taste Of You
recommendations.overview: It depicts the lives of several groups of characters interacting at the beach of Forte dei Marmi during the mid-1980s.

recommendations.title: Blackmail
recommendations.overview: When Dev finds about his wife's affair, he starts blackmailing her and her lover but the blackmail game backfires on him.

recommendations.title: Divorce Italian Style
recommendations.overview: Ferdinando Cefalù is desperate to marry his cousin, Angela, but he is married to Rosalia and divorce is illegal in Italy. To get around the law, he tries to trick his wife into having an affair so he can catch her and murder her, as he knows he would

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character 3
recommendations.overview: Dona Hermínia will have to rediscover and reinvent herself because her children are forming new families. This supermom will have to deal with a new life scenario: Marcelina is pregnant and Juliano is getting married.

recommendations.title: A Touch of Spice
recommendations.overview: "A Touch of Spice" is a story about Fanis, a young Greek boy growing up in Istanbul, whose grandfather, a culinary philosopher and mentor, teaches him that both food and life require a little salt to give them flavor. They both require... A Touch of

recommendations.title: ‎7 Hours to Win Your Heart
